# OWASP Agentic Skills Top 10 - Pull Request Template

## Description
Brief description of the changes in this PR.

## Type of Change
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Security enhancement
- [ ] Research addition
- [ ] Code example addition

## Changes Made
- List the specific files and sections changed
- Describe the nature of the changes (additions, modifications, deletions)

## AST Impact
- **AST Numbers Affected**: (e.g., AST01, AST03)
- **Risk Areas**: (e.g., Malicious Skills, Supply Chain)
- **Severity Changes**: Any updates to risk severity assessments

## Testing
- [ ] Changes build successfully (Jekyll)
- [ ] Links are valid and functional
- [ ] Markdown formatting is correct
- [ ] Cross-references are accurate
- [ ] No broken internal links

## Security Considerations
- [ ] No sensitive information exposed
- [ ] References to real vulnerabilities are properly cited
- [ ] No active exploit code included
- [ ] Risk assessments are accurate and evidence-based

## Documentation Updates
- [ ] README.md updated if necessary
- [ ] Table of contents reflects changes
- [ ] Cross-references between AST files are maintained
- [ ] Index page summary table updated

## Checklist
- [ ] I have read and followed the [CONTRIBUTING.md](CONTRIBUTING.md) guidelines
- [ ] My changes follow the project's style and structure
- [ ] I have tested the changes locally
- [ ] I have updated any relevant documentation
- [ ] My commits follow conventional commit format
- [ ] I have added appropriate tags and metadata

## Additional Notes
Any additional context, considerations, or follow-up work needed.

## Related Issues
Closes # (issue number)
